name: Suspicious Netsh DLL Persistence Detected
description: Detection of netsh.exe adding a helper DLL, which is a sophisticated persistence technique often used by attackers to maintain access, execute code, or escalate privileges.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when the suspicious Netsh helper was added.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the netsh.exe executable.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line arguments of netsh.exe, including 'add helper'.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account that executed the netsh command.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the event occurred.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process of netsh.exe.
